holdings.infoBox: XLB is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Linde stock at 14.44%, Newmont at 6.91%, Nucor at 6.32%, Freeport-McMoRan at 5.95%, and Vulcan Materials Company at 4.70%.

overview.description: The State Street Materials Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Materials Select Sector index, a market-cap-weighted index of US basic materials companies XLB was launched on Dec 16, 1998 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: 2 Sectors Where the Ultra-Wealthy Are Putting Their Money
data.text: Family offices poured more than $3 billion into tech, media, and telecom companies. But materials attracted the most capital—$4.8 billion.

data.text: Europe's embattled chemicals ​industry is getting an unexpected lift from the Iran war, as supply disruptions raise costs ‌for Asian rivals and customers prioritise reliability over price.
